src: A sleek maroon leather backpack with a rectangular shape. It features a top flap secured by a metallic clasp, a front pocket with buckled straps, and adjustable shoulder straps.
edit: A two-toned vintage-style bag in rich burgundy and tan. It boasts a classic rectangular shape, an ornate clasp, intricate stitching, dual leather straps, and vintage brass buckles.

per_image_non_shared_src.jasmin-chew-FPIsojqpgDw-unsplash: The object is worn by a person standing sideways. Background features blurred tree branches and soft daylight.
per_image_non_shared_src.jasmin-chew-KwG7_Q5Ni3A-unsplash: The object is centered, with the person facing forward against a building's wall with stone detailing.
per_image_non_shared_src.jasmin-chew-ZVJcHDJDl6Q-unsplash: The object is held by the handle next to a dark green door, capturing just the lower part of a skirt.
per_image_non_shared_src.jasmin-chew-rFxE7kfizrw-unsplash: The object is grasped by the handle near a rocky shoreline under a bright sky.
per_image_non_shared_src.jasmin-chew-uYi66ZIRpOE-unsplash: The object is worn on the back, angled slightly sideways in front of a green door and stone building.
